programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc:
This year, Angie decides that her and George should just get something cheap and from the heart for their anniversary. This gives Vic an opening to convince George to help him smuggle his brother Ontovio out of Cuba.
Meanwhile, Max has a fake birthday party to get free presents.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Michael expects praise but receives month-old evaluation notes; his whirlwind performance review includes Dwight's compliments, Jan's disapproval, and a parking-lot rant that leaves Pam and Jim hopelessly amused.

programme.title: Whisper of the Heart
programme.desc: Shizuku lives a simple life, dominated by her love for stories and writing. One day she notices that all the library books she has have been previously checked out by the same person: "Seiji Amasawa."

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: A global tour examining the behaviors of animals and revealing the effects of climate change on their environments.
